name: Blinding Flash
description: This invocation creates a sudden burst of intense white light, temporarily blinding everyone in its ten foot (3.0 m) radius. [cite: 136]

range.summary: 10 ft (3.0 m) radius; up to 60 ft (18.3 m) away. [cite: 133]

name: Cloud of Smoke
description: This magic enables the sorcerer to create a cloud of dense, black smoke up to ninety feet (27.4 m) away. [cite: 145]

duration.summary: 4 melee rounds (1 minute) per level of experience. [cite: 143]

name: Death Trance
description: A magically induced trance which makes the mage appear to be dead. [cite: 153] There is no breathing, pulse, heartbeat, or any other signs of life. [cite: 154]

duration.summary: 10 melee rounds (2.5 minutes) per level of experience. [cite: 150]

name: Globe of Daylight
description: A small globe or sphere of true daylight is magically created. [cite: 162] The light is bright enough to illuminate a 12 ft (3.65 m) area per each level of its creator's experience. [cite: 163]

range.summary: Near self or up to 30 ft (9.1 m) away. [cite: 159]

duration.summary: 12 melee rounds (3 minutes) per level of experience. [cite: 160]

name: See Aura
description: All things, organic and inorganic, have an aura. The aura has many distinctions, and can be used to see or sense things invisible to the eye. [cite: 172]

save.summary: None, but a psychic mind block will mask the presence of psychic abilities, the level of P.P.E. and possession. [cite: 169, 170]

reveals: Estimate the general level of experience. [cite: 174]
The presence of magic. [cite: 175]
The presence of psychic abilities. [cite: 176]
High or low base P.P.E. [cite: 177]
The presence of a possessing entity. [cite: 178]
The presence of an unusual human aberration, which indicates a serious illness, non-human, or alien. [cite: 179]

name: See the Invisible
description: The character can see forces, objects and creatures which can turn invisible or are naturally invisible. [cite: 185] Even if the creature has no form per se, the mystic will be able to discern the vaporous image or energy sphere which is the being. [cite: 186]

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience. [cite: 183]

reveals: Invisible forces, objects, and creatures. [cite: 185]
Ghosts, entities and astral bodies. [cite: 187]

name: Sense Evil
description: The sense evil invocation will enable its spell caster to feel or sense the presence of supernatural evil. [cite: 192]

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience. [cite: 190]

save.summary: None, except a psychic mind block, or a protection from a magic pentacle. [cite: 190]

reveals: The presence of supernatural evil. [cite: 192]
How many supernatural evil presences are within the area. [cite: 193]
The intensity of the evil and the general location of the source. [cite: 195]

name: Sense Magic
description: This magic ability enables the character to sense or feel the presence of magic. [cite: 202]

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience. [cite: 200]

reveals: The presence of magic. [cite: 202]
Proximity to the source (near or far). [cite: 203]
Whether a person or object is enchanted/under a magic spell. [cite: 204]

name: Sense Nightbane
description: This invocation works like the natural Nightbane ability to sense others of their kind, enabling the sorcerer to sense the presence of Nightbane within the area. [cite: 210]

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience. [cite: 208]

reveals: The presence of Nightbane. [cite: 210]
Whether there is more than one, and roughly how far away they are. [cite: 211]

name: Sense P.P.E.
description: This invocation allows the sorcerer to sense the presence of potential psychic energy (P.P.E.). [cite: 217]

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience. [cite: 214]

save.summary: Standard; ley lines and inanimate objects have no saving throw. [cite: 214, 215]

reveals: The presence of potential psychic energy in its range area. [cite: 223]
The approximate amount of P.P.E. each individual currently possesses. [cite: 224]

name: Thunderclap
description: The invocation produces a booming clap of thunders so loud that it seems to make the air vibrate. [cite: 232] As an intimidation device, it will momentarily startle and distract everyone other than the spell caster. [cite: 234]

range.summary: Directly affects the immediate area (30 ft/9.1 m around the sorcerer), but can be heard up to one mile (1.6 km) away. [cite: 229]

name: Befuddle
description: An enchantment that temporarily causes its victim to become confused and disoriented. [cite: 241]

duration.summary: 2 minutes (8 melees) per level of experience. [cite: 239]

name: Climb
description: An enchantment that enables the enchanted person to climb with exceptional, almost inhuman, skill, speed, and agility. [cite: 248]

range.summary: Self, or others up to 40 ft away (12.2 m). [cite: 246]

duration.summary: 5 minutes (20 melees) per level of experience. [cite: 246]

grantedSkills.name: Climb
grantedSkills.notes: Smooth, presumably unclimbable or extremely difficult surfaces to climb normally can be scaled with a skill level of 60%. [cite: 250]

name: Concealment
description: This magic makes any small object sort of invisible. Actually, it affects the perception of anybody who looks at it. [cite: 278] Unless the person(s) makes a successful saving throw, the item cannot be seen. [cite: 279]

range.summary: Small objects up to 40 ft away (12.2 m). [cite: 253]

name: Detect Concealment
description: A magic invocation that will instantly negate any concealment spells and reveal any objects which may have been mystically concealed. [cite: 261]

name: Extinguish Fire
description: The sorcerer can instantly put out up to a 20 foot (6.1 m) area of fire 80 ft (24.4 m) away. [cite: 267]

range.summary: 20 foot (6.1 m) area, up to 80 ft (24.4 m) away. [cite: 264]

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience. [cite: 265]

name: Fear
description: The invocation creates a sensation of fear over a particular area. [cite: 272] Anybody entering the area of enchantment must roll to save vs horror factor 16. [cite: 272]

range.summary: 20 foot (6.1 m) area, up to 100 feet (30.5 m) away. [cite: 270]

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melees) per level of experience. [cite: 271]

combatModifiers.notes: Will be momentarily stunned, lose initiative, and will be the last person to attack and will not be able to defend himself against an opponent's first strike each melee the person is in the area of fear. [cite: 272]

name: Heavy Breathing
description: The sorcerer is able to conjure a mysterious, frightful sound of heavy, labored breathing, as if something invisible is lurking about. [cite: 283] Those hearing the breathing will become fearful and panicky. [cite: 286]

save.summary: Standard; those who save are not affected/fearful. [cite: 290]

name: Levitation
description: Magic levitation enables the invoker of the magic to raise himself, or other people, or an object, straight up into the air and suspend it there (hover). [cite: 296]

movement.notes: Movement is limited to straight up and down; no horizontal motion is possible. Weight is restricted to 200 lbs (90 kg) plus 20 lbs (9 kg) per level of experience. [cite: 297, 298]

name: Mystic Alarm
description: The sorcerer can protect his possessions and domicile by placing mystic alarms on them. [cite: 306] If this object is touched or disturbed by anyone other than the spell caster, a silent alarm will alert him instantly. [cite: 308]

duration.summary: One year per level of experience. [cite: 304]

name: Ritual: Call Creature of Light
description: This ritual invocation contacts the nearest creature of light in the area. [cite: 314]

range.summary: 10 miles (16 km) per level of the caster [cite: 311]

name: Breathe Without Air
description: This invocation enables the person to function normally without air, whether it be underwater or in a vacuum, or in an area with little or no oxygen. [cite: 324]

duration.summary: 12 melees (3 minutes) per level of experience. [cite: 322]

name: Energy Bolt
description: The incantation creates an energy bolt that the mage can mentally direct by simply looking at his intended target. [cite: 330]

damage.notes: Increased to 6D6 under the influence of a ley line and 8D6 at a ley line nexus. [cite: 332]

name: Fingers of Wind
description: The magician can conjure a wind and manipulate it to touch, tap, bump or press against a person or object. [cite: 339]

name: Float in Air
description: This spell creates air currents which hold a person or object aloft, hovering about one foot (0.3 m) above the ground. [cite: 344]

range.summary: Self or others within 30 ft (9.1 m) [cite: 342]

name: Fuel Flame
description: The magic feeds any existing fire, doubling it in size. [cite: 354]

name: Ignite Fire
description: A magic that causes spontaneous combustion. The magic will ignite any material that can burn. [cite: 360]

duration.summary: Instant (fire lasts until it is put out). [cite: 358]

damage.notes: 2D6 S.D.C. per melee (beginning after the first 2 rounds). [cite: 365, 366]

name: Impervious to Fire
description: A magic invocation that makes the individual temporarily impervious to fire. [cite: 371] Normal and magical fires do no damage to the person or to anything he is wearing/on his person. [cite: 372]

range.summary: Self or others up to 60 ft (18.3 m) away. [cite: 368]

name: Impression
description: The sorcerer is magically instilled with the ability to receive psychic impressions from an object about its previous owner. [cite: 377]
reveals: General alignment; good, selfish, or evil. [cite: 379]
Human or not human. [cite: 380]
Old or young. [cite: 382]
Male or female. [cite: 383]
Healthy, sick or hurt. [cite: 384]
Whether the object is important or valuable to the individual. [cite: 385]

name: Invisibility: Simple
description: The spell caster and anything he is wearing or carrying at the time of the invocation are turned completely invisible. [cite: 391]

combatModifiers.notes: Attackers are at -5 to strike him (because they cannot see him). [cite: 526]

name: Magic Armor
description: This powerful spell instantly creates an invisible, weightless, noiseless, full suit of mystic armor upon the spell caster (or other). [cite: 407]

duration.summary: 4 melees (1 minute) per level of the spell caster [cite: 405]

name: Negate Poisons/Toxins
description: The sorcerer can magically turn a poisonous substance inert, rendering it harmless. [cite: 415]

name: Astral Projection
description: The incantation sends the spell caster's astral body into the astral plane, dimension. [cite: 459]

name: Charismatic Aura
description: The spell instantly enhances the person's physical beauty by eight, increasing his charisma so he can charm all who behold him. [cite: 466, 467]

duration.summary: 6 melee rounds per level of experience. [cite: 463]

effectProfiles.name: Friendship/Trust
effectProfiles.description: A statement of friendship, peace or trust which will inspire those sentiments in everyone affected. [cite: 474]

effectProfiles.name: Power/Fear
effectProfiles.description: A statement of power, anger, strength, or vile intent, will strike awe and fear into everyone affected. [cite: 475]

effectProfiles.name: Successful Deception
effectProfiles.description: Enables the charismatic aura person to convincingly lie like a master con-man. There is an 80% chance that those affected will believe anything he tells them. [cite: 477, 478]

name: Cure Minor Disorders
description: A unique bit of curative magic that will instantly relieve minor physical disorders and illness, such as headaches, indigestion, gas, heartburn, nausea, hiccups, muscle stiffness, low fever (under 101 degrees) and similar. [cite: 485]

name: Energy Field
description: The magic creates a protective field of energy around the mystic, others, or an object. [cite: 491]

range.summary: Self or others up to a 60 ft (18.3 m) distance. [cite: 488]

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience. [cite: 488]

name: Fire Bolt
description: Like the energy bolt, the sorcerer can create and direct a bolt of fire. [cite: 499]

range.summary: 100 ft (30.5 m) plus 5 ft (1.5 m) per level of experience. [cite: 496]

damage.notes: Bonus to strike is +4. Increases to 8D6 at ley lines and 1D6x10 at a ley line nexus. [cite: 499, 500]

name: Nightvision
description: This invocation gives the character the power to see in absolute darkness. [cite: 506]

name: Repel Animals
description: An enchantment that will make even a hostile predatory animal stop, turn, and leave the area without harming the mage or anybody near him. [cite: 512]

name: Shadow Meld
description: This unique magic enables the mage to step into shadows, becoming totally invisible, even to a "see the invisible" spell. [cite: 518]

duration.summary: Two minutes per level of experience. [cite: 516]

grantedSkills.name: Shadow Prowl
grantedSkills.notes: Or at +15% to normal skill, whichever is higher. [cite: 522]

name: Swim as Fish (minor)
description: An incantation that provides the character with exceptional swimming abilities. [cite: 532]

range.summary: Self or others up to 10 ft (3.0 m) away. [cite: 529]

name: Trance
description: This enchantment places another person into a zombie-like state in which the entranced person is in a hypnotic daze, unaware of his environment or the happenings around him. [cite: 538]

physical_attributes.notes: All physical attributes function as if they are half of what they really are. [cite: 544]

name: Calling
description: The calling is like a limited form of telepathic communication in which the sorcerer can mentally call a specific individual. [cite: 550]

range.summary: 2 miles (3.2 km) per level of experience. [cite: 548]

name: Charm Weapon
description: This invocation temporarily enchants a weapon, to make it more effective against supernatural beings. [cite: 562]

duration.summary: 12 hours per level of the spell caster. [cite: 561]

name: Circle of Flame
description: The mystic can create a circle of flame around himself. [cite: 573]

damage.notes: Inflicts 6D6 S.D.C. damage to anybody who tries to pass through the fire. [cite: 574, 575]

name: Domination
description: Domination is another trance-like enchantment that enables the mystic to impose his will over his victim's, forcing the person to do his biding. [cite: 581]

name: Energy Disruption
description: The invocation will temporarily knock-out, stop, or immobilize, any electrical device it is aimed at. [cite: 598]

duration.summary: 3 minutes (12 melees) per level of experience. [cite: 596]

name: Escape
description: The escape invocation enables the sorcerer to magically escape any bonds, or open any locking mechanism that bars his way. [cite: 605]

range.summary: Self, touch, or within 5 ft (1.5 m). [cite: 603]

name: Eyes of Thoth
description: This invocation enables the character to read and understand ALL written languages, modern and ancient. [cite: 613]

name: Fly
description: The sorcerer can magically bestow the power of flight only to an inanimate object not made of metal or plastic. [cite: 620]

name: Heal Wounds
description: This powerful invocation will heal physical wounds, such as bruises, cuts, gashes, bullet wounds, burned flesh and pulled muscles. [cite: 634]

range.summary: Touch or 3 ft (0.9 m) per level of experience. [cite: 632]

save.summary: Standard, if the person resists the magic. [cite: 633]

name: Horrific Illusion
description: The sorcerer creates a frightening, illusionary image of a horrible sight using common images. [cite: 643]

name: Midnight Wind
description: This incantation creates a cold, hurricane-force wind and also temporarily darkens the sky in the area. [cite: 650]

duration.summary: One melee round per level of experience. [cite: 648]

damage.notes: Once per melee round, against one target (+3 to strike). [cite: 652]

name: Sleep
description: The invocation can turn any normal, drinkable fluid or food into a sleep-inducing potion. [cite: 657]

duration.summary: Becomes inert within 15 minutes; effect lasts 10 minutes per level of experience. [cite: 656]

name: Superhuman Strength
description: The incantation magically increases the character's physical strength (P.S.) to 30, physical endurance (P.E.) to 24 and adds 30 S.D.C. [cite: 664]

name: Superhuman Speed
description: The invocation bestows the character with the incredible speed attribute of 44 (equal to 30 mph/48 kmph) and adds a bonus of +2 to parry and +6 to dodge for the duration of the magic. [cite: 670]

name: Swim as Fish (superior)
description: The enchanted persons are then able to breathe underwater and swim expertly (at a speed of 20). [cite: 677]

name: Apparition
description: The magician can create a realistic apparition in the form of a horrible creature or weird thing that will attack anybody who comes within 20 ft (6.1 m) of it. Although an illusion, it will appear completely real, interacting with an opponent's actions.

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience.

save.effectsOnSuccessfulSave: The apparition disappears for that individual.

spawnedPresence.name: Apparition
spawnedPresence.notes: An illusionary creature that inflicts imaginary damage. If an opponent 'dies' from this damage, they fall unconscious.

name: Call Lightning
description: The spell creates a lightning bolt which can be directed at any specific target up to 300 ft (91.4 m) away. The lightning bolt shoots down from the sky.

damage.notes: Plus 1D6 damage per level of the caster.

name: Compulsion
description: The spell caster can implant a sudden desire or need in another person's mind. The enchanted person will be consumed with the object or action of the implanted compulsion.

range.summary: 60 ft (18.3 m); must be within line of vision.

name: Cure Illness
description: A potent magic that can cure ordinary disease and illness, such as fever, flu and other common diseases. Cannot cure cancer, broken bones, or magical sickness.

save.summary: None; standard if the person resists treatment.

name: Fire Ball
description: The spell caster creates a large fire ball which hurls at its target at an awesome speed, inflicting massive damage. The fire ball is magically directed and seldom misses.

damage.notes: Plus 1D6 damage per level of the caster.

name: Impervious to Energy
description: The sorcerer can make himself impervious to all forms of energy including fire, heat, electricity, lasers and so on. Physical attacks still do normal damage.

name: Mask of Deceit
description: Magically creates an illusionary mask over the person's own facial gestures. Age, gender, skin color, and specific features can be altered.

save.summary: Standard, but onlookers are at -4 to save.

name: Memory Bank
description: The mage can implant a block of memory/information deep into another person's subconscious mind without them ever knowing what it is. The sorcerer can retrieve it at any time with a mere touch.

save.summary: None if willing; standard if unwilling.

name: Ritual: Call Nightlands Denizen
description: At the completion of the ritual, the mirror will turn black and open into the Nightlands, calling the nearest Nightland denizen in the area (Hounds, Hunters, Ashmedai, Nemtar, Dopplegangers).

range.summary: 20 ft (6.1 m) per level of experience.

entries.label: A mirror or other reflective surface

name: Telekinesis
description: Temporarily empowers the spell caster with the psychic ability to move objects with thought. Can hurl objects for damage or manipulate items.

combatModifiers.notes: Physical/skill bonuses to strike and parry do not apply. Maximum weight is 60 lbs (27 kg).

damage.notes: Small objects: 1D6. Medium: 2D4 to 3D4. Large: 3D6 to 4D6.

name: Ritual: Call Nightlord
description: Contacts the Nightlords. The contacted Ba'al or one of his avatars will sense they are being called, and will magically know where the call came from.

range.summary: 1 mile (1.6 km) per level of experience, or 10 miles/lvl if specific.

name: Teleport: Lesser
description: Instantly transmits up to 50 lbs (22.5 kg) of non-living matter from the location of the spell weaver to any known location miles away.

range.summary: Five miles (8 km) per level of experience; touch.

duration.summary: Requires two full melees (30 seconds) to cast.

entries.label: Success
entries.effect: Object arrives on target (+2% per level of experience).

entries.label: Failure
entries.effect: Object never arrives and could be anywhere within range.

name: Time Slip
description: Momentarily suspends time, enabling the spell caster to slip 7 seconds into the future. The mage can move while all around him are caught in the past.

combatModifiers.notes: All those around the mage lose two attacks that melee round.

name: Tongues
description: The magic enables the character to perfectly understand and speak all spoken languages (98% proficiency).

name: Words of Truth
description: A person affected by this enchantment is compelled to answer all questions truthfully. The sorcerer can ask two brief questions per melee round.

save.summary: Standard (makes a save for each question asked).

name: Agony
description: Incapacitates its victim with pain. The victim has no attacks per melee, cannot move or even speak; only writhe in agony. There is no physical damage, but the pain is real.

range.summary: 5 ft (1.5 m) per level of experience.

duration.summary: 1 minute (4 melee rounds) of agony, plus 1 minute of recovery penalties.

combatModifiers.notes: First minute: 0 attacks, paralyzed. Second minute (recovery): attacks and speed halved, -1 to strike, parry, and dodge.

name: Invisibility: Superior
description: Makes the spell caster invisible to all means of detection. Infrared, ultraviolet, heat, motion detectors, and even an animal's sense of smell cannot locate the person.

grantedSkills.name: Prowl
grantedSkills.notes: Magic is broken if the character makes a hostile move or attacks.

name: Life Drain
description: A debilitating magic that weakens an opponent. The victim will turn pale and experience extreme weakness.

range.summary: 30 ft (9.1 m) (Can affect a 15 ft area at level 4+).

duration.summary: 2 melees (30 seconds) per level of experience.

combatModifiers.notes: Reduced speed and feeling of weakness remains for six hours after spell ends.

name: Metamorphosis: Animal
description: Completely transform into a particular animal, from a cat to a lion or bird. Character gets all inherent abilities of the animal but retains their I.Q., memory, S.D.C. and HP.

name: Paralysis: Superior
description: Temporarily incapacitates its victim, paralyzing him completely. The victim cannot move or even speak.

combatModifiers.notes: Victim cannot move or speak. If damage is inflicted, the spell is broken.

name: Purification (Food/Water)
description: Purify food or water, cleansing it of disease, bacteria and poisons/toxins.

name: Ritual: An Eye for An Eye
description: Causes any attack that inflicts damage on the spell caster to magically wound the attacker as well for the exact same amount.

damageReflection.notes: Only damage that harms the caster's personal S.D.C. and Hit Points is reflected.

name: Second Sight
description: Enables a mage to see and hear what another person is doing at that very moment. Can also be used to transmit the mage's present activity to another person.

range.summary: 5 miles (8 km) per level of experience.

save.summary: None; mind block prevents its use.

name: Wind Rush
description: Creates a short, powerful wind gusting at 60 mph (96 kmph), capable of knocking people down, blowing away small objects, or creating dust storms.

combatModifiers.notes: Victim loses 1 melee gathering balance, and 1D8 melees to gather dropped items.

name: Hallucination
description: Creates a mystic illusion or delusion implanted in the character's mind that only he/she experiences.

name: Locate
description: Enables the sorcerer to sense the general location of his quarry.

range.summary: 15 miles (24 km) per level of experience.

entries.label: Success (Spell)
entries.effect: Sense the general location (success ratio is 41% for spell, 89% for ritual).

name: Luck Curse
description: Inflicts the person with terrible luck. Normal combat bonuses drop to zero, critical strikes do normal damage, and skills are heavily penalized.

combatModifiers.notes: Bonuses to strike, parry, dodge, initiative, and roll with punch are reduced to ZERO. Kick attacks have a 60% chance of tripping.

globalSkillModifier.notes: Penalty applies only during critical situations.

name: Metamorphosis: Human
description: Change shape to alter height, weight, age, hair color, gender, and features. A non-human can transform to appear completely human.

formTransformation.notes: Changes appearance only; retains own voice, memory, skills, and attributes.

name: Minor Curse
description: Inflicts a curse in the form of minor physical disorders that cause constant irritation.

effectProfiles.name: Fever
effectProfiles.description: Victim feels drained and tired.

effectProfiles.name: Gas
effectProfiles.description: Indigestion and nausea. Farts every two melees.

combatModifiers.notes: Sneak attacks and prowls are impossible.

effectProfiles.name: Headache
effectProfiles.description: Dull throbbing headache.

effectProfiles.name: Hiccups
effectProfiles.description: Annoying hiccups constantly interrupt speaking.

effectProfiles.name: Ingrown Toenail
effectProfiles.description: Painful to walk.

effectProfiles.name: Itching and Rash
effectProfiles.description: Maddening itch.

effectProfiles.name: Nausea
effectProfiles.description: Stomach ache, vomiting.

effectProfiles.name: Vertigo
effectProfiles.description: Dizziness at high speeds or heights.

combatModifiers.notes: When vertigo hits: 1 attack per melee, no init, -8 strike/parry/dodge.

name: Negation (of Magic)
description: Instantly cancels the effects or influence of most magic.

save.summary: Special (Must roll a successful save against the magic to negate it).

name: Nightlands Portal (Ritual)
description: Opens a dimensional gateway into the Nightlands (or to Earth if cast in the Nightlands).

name: Oracle
description: A dream-like vision of a possible future. The focus of the vision depends on what or whom the mage is thinking about.

name: Sickness
description: Debilitating magic which afflicts its victims with the severe symptoms of a specific disease.

name: Spoil (Water/Food)
description: Instantly transform good food into spoiled, making the food inedible and the water undrinkable. Eating it causes cramps and diarrhea.

combatModifiers.notes: Penalties apply to those who eat/drink the spoiled food.

name: Temporary Enchantment
description: Enchants a weapon, allowing it to inflict double damage to supernatural creatures.

duration.summary: One week per level of the caster.

name: Curse: Phobia
description: Implants in its victim an unreasoning fear of something.

name: Familiar Link
description: Mentally links the mage with a small animal. This link is permanent, producing a symbiotic relationship where the two share senses and HP.

permanentCosts.notes: Permanent loss if the familiar is killed.

name: Metamorphosis: Insect
description: Transforms into an insect. Retains I.Q., memory, HP and SDC, but cannot speak or use human skills.

range.summary: Self, or others through ritual magic.

name: Protection Circle: Simple
description: Protects everybody inside its radius by keeping lesser supernatural creatures five feet (1.5 m) away from the circle.

name: Summon and Control Canine
description: Summons 1D4 canines plus 1 per level of experience, forcing them to obey the mage's command and fight to the death.

spawnedPresence.notes: Plus 1 additional canine per level of experience.

name: Curse: Temporary Insanity
description: Temporarily renders the person insane. The effects can only be reversed by a remove curse.

name: Transferal
description: Temporarily transfers the mage's mystic essence (all but 4 PPE and experience) into another person, making the mage undetectable to See Aura as a magic user.

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience.

name: Banishment
description: Forces lesser supernatural beings/demons to leave the immediate area. They cannot return for two weeks per level of experience.

name: Bind Nightbane
description: Exerts power over a Nightbane, preventing them from leaving a circle, keeping them from moving, or forcing them into Morphus or Facade form.

name: Bonding (Ritual)
description: Combines magic to strike at somebody from a great distance via a doll effigy. Allows non-energy spells to be cast on the doll, affecting the real person.

range.summary: 12 miles (19.2 km) per level of experience.

save.summary: Standard, with a -1 penalty to save.

entries.label: Lock of hair, clippings, or blood from victim

name: Control/Enslave Entity
description: Enables the mage to control entities when encountered. Commands two entities per level of experience.

name: Curse: Paranoia
description: Inflicts extreme paranoia on its victim. The individual will become convinced that he can trust no one.

name: Metamorphosis: Superior
description: Transform into any real, living creature, animal, human, supernatural or insect. Can transform others via ritual.

range.summary: Self, or others by use of ritual only.

name: Summon/Control Rodents
description: Produces an army of mice or rats that obey the will of the sorcerer who summoned them.

duration.summary: Five hours per level of experience.

name: Summon Nightlands Denizen (Ritual)
description: Summons to Earth a Nightland creature of the caster's choice (Hounds, Hunters, Dopplegangers).

name: Wards
description: Creates mystic symbols used to protect items of value, dwellings, and as booby traps.

duration.summary: Effects vary with type. Ward lasts 150 years per level of caster until triggered.

effectProfiles.name: Alarm
effectProfiles.description: A screeching, siren-like noise is instantly sounded.

effectProfiles.name: Fear
effectProfiles.description: An aura of fear engulfs everybody within 20 feet.

effectProfiles.name: Fire Bolt
effectProfiles.description: The person touching the item is struck by a fire bolt.

effectProfiles.name: Paralysis (lesser)
effectProfiles.description: Temporarily paralyses the person's hand and arm.

effectProfiles.name: Sleep
effectProfiles.description: Puts to sleep everybody within 10 ft.

effectProfiles.name: Agony
effectProfiles.description: The person is racked with agony.

effectProfiles.name: Curse (minor)
effectProfiles.description: Inflicts a minor curse lingering for weeks.

effectProfiles.name: Curse (phobia)
effectProfiles.description: Inflicts a phobia curse lingering for weeks.

effectProfiles.name: Banishment
effectProfiles.description: Instantly forces lesser supernatural beings from the area.

name: Control Nightlands Denizen
description: An incantation specially designed to control the servants of the Nightlords (Hounds, Hunters and Dopplegangers). [cite: 1286] This ritual does not summon the creatures, but enables the sorcerer to control them when encountered, or if summoned through a different spell. [cite: 1287] The sorcerer can control two Dopplegangers or one Hound or Hunter every time the incantation is used. [cite: 1288]

save.summary: Standard. [cite: 1284] This saving throw is at +4 if the sorcerer is directly working against the Nightlords, and at -4 if the mystic is serving the Nightlords, directly or indirectly. [cite: 1290]

name: Create Magic Scroll
description: The arcanist is able to transfer mystic energy and powers into an inanimate object. [cite: 1300] In this case, the mage can magically make the words to a magic spell appear on paper. [cite: 1301] The words on a scroll disappear the moment they are read aloud, leaving only a blank piece of paper. [cite: 1310]

ppe.notes: 100 plus the P.P.E. needed to cast the magic spell placed on the scroll. [cite: 1299]

limitations.otherLimitations: The mage must be able to read and write. [cite: 1302] All saving throws from scroll magic are 12 if created as a spell or 16 if created as a ritual. [cite: 1315]

range.summary: Identical to spell placed on scroll. [cite: 1297]

name: Curse: Neurosis
description: The incantation afflicts its victim with a neurotic disorder. The sorcerer can implant one specific neurosis or roll on the random neurosis table of the insanity section. [cite: 1320] The insanity is temporary and fades away several days after the duration time has elapsed. [cite: 1321]

name: Nightlands Passage
description: This invocation instantly transports the caster and anybody/anything within the radius of the effect (10 ft/3.0 m per level of experience) into or out of the Nightlands. [cite: 1325] The caster and other 'passengers' will be transported into the corresponding point in the Nightlands. [cite: 1326]

ranges.summary: 10 ft (3.0 m) radius per level of experience. [cite: 1323]

range.summary: 10 ft (3.0 m) radius per level of experience. [cite: 1323]

areaOfEffect.summary: 10 ft (3.0 m) radius per level of experience. [cite: 1323]

save.summary: Standard if unwilling to be transported. [cite: 1324]

name: Remove Curse
description: The mage can attempt to remove any type of curse using this incantation. [cite: 1331] To determine success a 20-sided die is rolled (plus bonuses) to save vs magic. [cite: 1332] A successful save means that the curse is instantly gone. [cite: 1333]
notes: The remove curse is a powerful magic that provides bonuses to save vs magic and to remove that curse. Spell: +5 to save. Ritual: +10 to save. [cite: 1336, 1337, 1338]

name: Summon and Control Animals (Ritual)
description: A superior summoning pentacle, the invocation empowers the arcanist to summon and control any type of animal. [cite: 1342] Any animal who comes into the arcanist's 600 foot (183 m) range while in the pentagram will obey the mage unless it makes a successful save vs magic. [cite: 1346]
targetCountFormula: Tiny animals: 40 per level. Medium: 8 per level. Large: 6 per level. Exotic: 1 per level. [cite: 1343, 1344, 1345, 1346]

name: Summon Fog
description: The spell caster can call forth a dense fog that will impair vision and make travel difficult. [cite: 1352] The fog is so thick that a person can only see clearly for four feet (1.2 m) and see only blurred, shadowy figures and shapes for about another 10 ft (3.0 m). [cite: 1353] Safe travel is slowed to a crawl. [cite: 1356]

ranges.summary: Up to 10 miles (16 km) per level of experience. [cite: 1349]

range.summary: Up to 10 miles (16 km) per level of experience. [cite: 1349]

areaOfEffect.summary: One mile area (1.6 km) per level of the sorcerer. [cite: 1355]

name: Summon Nightlord Avatar
description: This risky ritual summons a specific Avatar of a Nightlord. [cite: 1371] The Avatar must be known by its given name and must be still active/living. [cite: 1372] The invocation does not offer any way to control or restrain the creature. [cite: 1376, 1378]

save.summary: Standard if the Avatar resists the summons (+5 to save). [cite: 1369]

name: Amulet
description: The 'amulet' is a potent invocation that instills a medallion of charm with mystic properties that will protect an individual from magic or supernatural forces. [cite: 1384] The only requirement of the invocation is that the amulet be made of one metal purified by fire or made of semiprecious stone. [cite: 1385]

ppe.notes: Cost varies based on the specific amulet profile selected. [cite: 1383]

duration.summary: Exists as long as the medallion is not destroyed. [cite: 1382]

effectProfiles.name: Charm
effectProfiles.description: A general ward against magic that provides a bonus of +1 to save versus magic and psychic attacks. [cite: 1388]

effectProfiles.name: Protection Against Sickness
effectProfiles.description: Amulet that specifically protects against the eight level magic invocation 'sickness.' Bonus of +6 to save. [cite: 1390]

effectProfiles.name: Protection Against Insanity
effectProfiles.description: Adds a bonus of +4 to save against all magically induced insanities. [cite: 1392]

effectProfiles.name: Protection Against the Supernatural
effectProfiles.description: Adds a bonus of +2 to save vs horror factor. [cite: 1393]

effectProfiles.name: See the Invisible
effectProfiles.description: Enables only the wearer of the medallion to see the invisible. [cite: 1394]

effectProfiles.name: Sense the Presence of Spirits
effectProfiles.description: The amulet changes color whenever an entity(s) is in the area. Range: 60 ft (18.3 m). [cite: 1395, 1396]

effectProfiles.name: Turn the Undead
effectProfiles.description: A charm that will prevent any of the undead from physically touching them while they wear or hold the amulet. [cite: 1397]

entries.label: Medallion
entries.notes: Made of one metal purified by fire or made of semiprecious stone. [cite: 1385]

name: Calm Storms
description: Using ritual magic the mystic can turn a torrential rain into a drizzle, reduce winds to a gentle breeze, shrink ocean waves to normal, disperse a tornado in an instant and get the sun to peek through clearing skies. [cite: 1403]

ranges.summary: Immediate area around the mage, affecting a one mile (1.6 km) area per level of experience. [cite: 1400, 1401]

range.summary: Immediate area around the mage, affecting a one mile (1.6 km) area per level of experience. [cite: 1400, 1401]

areaOfEffect.summary: One mile (1.6 km) area per level of experience. [cite: 1400, 1401]

name: Metamorphosis: Mist
description: Said to be the most powerful of all the metamorph magics, the mage can transform himself into a mist. [cite: 1407] As a mist, no physical or energy attacks can harm him. [cite: 1408] No locked door can stop him, for he can slip through the tiniest crack or keyhole. [cite: 1409] The mist moves at a maximum speed of 14. Prowls (natural, innate ability) at an 80% skill proficiency, is completely silent, can hover up to 100 ft (30.5 m) high, and is semi-transparent. [cite: 1412]

ranges.summary: Self, or others through ritual magic. [cite: 1405]

range.summary: Self, or others through ritual magic. [cite: 1405]

save.summary: None or standard if an unwilling subject. [cite: 1406]

name: Summon and Control Rain (Ritual)
description: The sorcerer can create a rainstorm out of thin air. [cite: 1416] The rain can be controlled to be a drizzle, light rain or downpour. [cite: 1417] One mile (1.6 km) per level of experience can be affected by the rain. [cite: 1418]

ranges.summary: Immediate area around the mage, or up to 10 miles (16 km) away per level of experience. [cite: 1413]

range.summary: Immediate area around the mage, or up to 10 miles (16 km) away per level of experience. [cite: 1413]

areaOfEffect.summary: One mile (1.6 km) per level of experience. [cite: 1418]

name: Enchant Weapon (Ritual)
description: An enchanted weapon will permanently charge a weapon with mystical energy, enabling it to damage supernatural beings, including vampires. [cite: 1426] It will inflict double damage to all supernatural creatures (including Nightbane, Guardians, elementals and dragons), but does normal damage to humans and other S.D.C. beings. [cite: 1427]

ppe.notes: 600 points if enchanting a missile weapon. [cite: 1428, 1429]

duration.summary: Permanent, or until the weapon is destroyed. [cite: 1423]

name: Protection Circle: Superior
description: The superior protection circle will protect everybody inside its radius by preventing any supernatural creatures from coming any closer than 20 ft (6.1 m) from its edge. [cite: 1438] Even greater beings (including the Nightlords) are held at bay. [cite: 1439] Lesser beings cannot stand to be within line of sight of the circle and are forced to leave. [cite: 1440]

ppe.notes: Can be reactivated immediately at a cost of 20 P.P.E. [cite: 1432, 1436]

name: Summon Storm
description: The spell caster can create a destructive storm out of thin air. [cite: 1448] A rainstorm will create a torrential downpour of 4 inches of rain per hour, causing flooding even in cities. [cite: 1449] The storm is accompanied by damaging winds gusting to 35 and 45 mph (54 to 72 kmph). [cite: 1457]

ranges.summary: Immediate area around the mage or up to 10 miles (16 km) away. [cite: 1446]

range.summary: Immediate area around the mage or up to 10 miles (16 km) away. [cite: 1446]

name: Summon Nightlord
description: This dangerous and little-known invocation will summon a Nightlord from anywhere on Earth or the Nightlands. [cite: 1469] The title/given name (not the real name) of the Nightlord is necessary to cast the invocation. [cite: 1474]

save.summary: If the Nightlord is unwilling, he saves at +8. [cite: 1468]

name: Sanctum
description: The room is instantly turned into a safe haven, or sanctum, free of mystic disturbance. [cite: 1480] While inside the room, the mage cannot be found by the locate spell, cannot be seen by second sight, and cannot be affected by bonding magic. [cite: 1481] Even more impressive is that animated dead and undead cannot enter the sanctum. [cite: 1482]

ranges.summary: 30x30 ft (9.1x9.1 m) room. Can be created up to 200 miles (320 km) away. [cite: 1476]

range.summary: 30x30 ft (9.1x9.1 m) room. Can be created up to 200 miles (320 km) away. [cite: 1476]

duration.summary: The lifetime of the mage or until canceled. [cite: 1477]

name: Talisman
description: The invocation enables the sorcerer to empower an ordinary object with magic powers. [cite: 1501] Once an object is transformed into a talisman, the sorcerer can empower it with one magic spell. [cite: 1503] The spell can be selected from levels one through eight, excluding illusion types. [cite: 1504] The mage can elect to make it a potential psychic energy battery. Instead of spells, the mystic can put up to 50 P.P.E. into it initially and recharge it with 30 P.P.E. at the cost of 60. [cite: 1486, 1487, 1488]

ppe.notes: 500 P.P.E. to create. Replacing exhausted spells costs 50 P.P.E. plus the spell invocation cost. [cite: 1509]

limitations.otherLimitations: The only substances which cannot be used are iron and plastic, and the object cannot be larger than two feet (0.6 m) tall, long or wide. [cite: 1502]

name: Close Rift
description: The master of magic can close a Rift by sheer force of will. [cite: 1518] The Rift will automatically vanish if successful. [cite: 1521]

permanentCosts.notes: Permanently drains the mage of two P.P.E. points from his permanent base whether successful or not. [cite: 1519]

name: Id Barrier
description: The character can erect a powerful, defensive shield of semi-transparent energy. [cite: 1526] The barrier itself emanates horror, and a character must save vs horror factor 14 to even come within 10 ft of it. [cite: 1527] A failed save vs magic means the character must face an apparition of his greatest fear. [cite: 1531]

ranges.summary: Up to 200 ft (61.0 m) away, plus 100 ft (30.5 m) per level of experience. [cite: 1524]

range.summary: Up to 200 ft (61.0 m) away, plus 100 ft (30.5 m) per level of experience. [cite: 1524]

name: Restoration
description: This powerful incantation will instantly and completely heal wounds, cuts, bruises, burns, etc., restoring full S.D.C. and hit points, while leaving minimal scarring. [cite: 1538] The invocation can also restore severed limbs, such as a hand, arm, or leg, providing that the limb has not been severed from its body for more than 48 hours. [cite: 1541]

healing.notes: Restores full S.D.C. and hit points. [cite: 1538]

name: Dimensional Portal
description: The dimensional portal invocation opens a two-way door to another dimension. [cite: 1550] The mage can open a door to a specific world or randomly. [cite: 1551]

duration.summary: 30 seconds (2 melees) per level of the spell caster, or one minute per level of experience when performed as a ritual. [cite: 1546, 1547]

name: Teleport: Superior
description: The sorcerer can instantly transport himself and up to 1000 lbs (450 kg) per level of experience, hundreds of miles away. [cite: 1561]

ranges.summary: Self or others; distance of 300 miles (480 km) per level of experience. [cite: 1556, 1557]

range.summary: Self or others; distance of 300 miles (480 km) per level of experience. [cite: 1556, 1557]

entries.label: Wrong Place (Far)
entries.effect: Appear at the wrong place. No idea of present location, 3D6x100 miles (480 to 2900 km) off course. [cite: 1576]

entries.label: Wrong Place (Near)
entries.effect: Appear at the wrong place. No idea of present location, 1D6x100 miles (160 to 960 km) off course. [cite: 1577]

entries.label: Fall
entries.effect: Teleport several feet above the ground; everybody falls, suffering 2D6 damage. [cite: 1578]

entries.label: Instant Death
entries.effect: Teleport into an object; instant death. [cite: 1579]

name: Astral Portal
description: This spell creates a dimensional doorway between the Astral Plane and the physical world (either originating from or leading to Earth or the Nightlands; character's choice). The exact location to which the portal leads (whether it is on the astral or physical world) must be known and familiar to the spell caster.

ranges.summary: 20 feet (6.1 m); creates a 10 foot (3 m) wide and tall opening.

duration.summary: Four melee rounds per level of the spell caster.

save.summary: Special. There is normally no saving throw, but if the spell is used to try to flee an astral domain, the creator or creators of the domain, if aware of the attempt, may try to prevent it. This works like a normal save versus magic.

name: Circle of Concealment
description: This spell hides an area from all or most people. Anybody passing by the area will pay no attention to anything concealed by the circle. The circle can also be "programmed" so that certain individuals, group members, or those who know the right passwords can see past the mystical effect.

ppe.notes: The first usage only costs 15 P.P.E., while the second requires 100 P.P.E.

ranges.summary: 20 foot (6.1 m) radius per level of experience. If done as a ritual, use the sorcerer with the highest level, and add 10 feet (3.0 m) per additional magician involved in the ritual.

duration.summary: One hour per level of experience/one year per level of experience.

save.summary: A save versus ritual magic will allow somebody else to sense that something is "wrong" about the area, and may lead to the discovery of whatever is hidden by the circle.

name: Dream Window
description: The spell opens a window into the Dreamstream. Anybody (human or supernatural) who crosses the window from the waking to the dreaming world is temporarily transformed into a dream construct, with S.D.C. equal to their normal S.D.C. and hit points combined.

duration.summary: One minute per level of experience.

save.summary: None. People glancing into the window failing a save vs psionics are temporarily stunned for 1D4 rounds.

notes: Every melee round that the window is open, there is a cumulative 20% chance that something or somebody will slip out.

name: Dream Senses
description: This power allows the mage to project his consciousness into the Dreamstream. While doing so, he has all the abilities and limitations described under the Dreamdance (Minor) psychic power.

duration.summary: Five minutes per level of the spell caster.

name: Observe Dream
description: This ability allows the magician to peer into the Dream Pool of a sleeping person. By touching the sleeping person, the mage can see any ongoing dreams or nightmares, as well as any dream monsters and invaders who may be attacking the character while he or she sleeps.

ranges.summary: 10 feet (3 m) per level of experience.

duration.summary: Five minutes plus two minutes per level of experience.

name: Summon & Control Astral Being (Minor)
description: This ritual plucks an astral being of any specific species the caster indicates, from the Astral Plane and brings it to the physical world. This can only be a minor or common astral entity.

spawnedPresence.label: Any minor or common astral entity

control.summary: The astral being is automatically under the control of the summoner and will obey him without question throughout the duration period.

name: Summon & Control Astral Being (Major)
description: As per the minor fifth level spell, but this ritual can summon any major astral beings, including Necrophim, Torturians, and Vampire Specters, as well as greater astral entities.

duration.summary: Four hours per level of experience.

control.summary: The spell will force the creature to obey, but almost invariably, evil and powerful entities will seek revenge against the summoner unless the orders given were something the creature would enjoy doing.

duration.summary: Four hours per level of experience.

name: Summon & Control Dream Being (Minor)
description: This ability temporarily summons a minor dream entity, such as a Dream Ghoul or a minor dream persona. The creature will be temporarily kept alive while outside the Dreamstream while it receives orders and commands, which it will then carry out in the Dreamstream and Dream Pools.

control.summary: Kept alive outside the Dreamstream to receive orders, but cannot exist in the material world.

name: Summon & Control Dream Being (Major)
description: As per the seventh level spell, but applies to greater dream creatures, including Guilt Eaters, Dream Furies, Soul Leeches and strong, "key" personas.

control.summary: Will obey, but these beings will often try to discover the spell caster's Dream Pool and get their revenge on him at a later date.
